meta.purpose: Reasoning chains for why a motion decision is right or wrong.
meta.load_condition: Load when the user asks why, tradeoffs, diagnosis, quality review, or strategic choice.

reasoning_chains.conclusion: One scene should carry one argument.
logic: Programmatic video can easily become a dumping ground.
Viewers retain transformations better than lists.
A clear scene goal enables reusable code and strong editing.
reasoning_chains.so_what: Before coding, write the scene sentence: This scene proves that __.
